title: Link-local address logging duplicated in main.c and lichen_l2.c
description: main.c:139-152 and lichen_l2.c:455-477 both derive and log the link-local address from EUI-64. The lichen_l2.c version is the integration path; the main.c version is standalone mode. Consider extracting a shared helper that logs the link-local address given an EUI-64 to reduce duplication.
